title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: Tapping the "Go" button on the Device page under Support should open the Poly Contact Support page.
steps: A screen appears asking "Which device do you have issues with?" and lists paired devices.
Tap a device to see a modal with device details and a "Go" button.
expected: The Poly Contact Support page (https://support.hp.com/contact/product/poly-lens-mobile-app/2101801768/model/2101801771?source=polydropdown) should open.
